verses.latin_vulgate: In tempore illo dixit Dominus ad me : Dola tibi duas tabulas lapideas, sicut priores fuerunt, et ascende ad me in montem : faciesque arcam ligneam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּעֵ֨ת הַהִ֜וא אָמַ֧ר יְהֹוָ֣ה אֵלַ֗י פְּסׇל־לְךָ֞ שְׁנֵֽי־לוּחֹ֤ת אֲבָנִים֙ כָּרִ֣אשֹׁנִ֔ים וַעֲלֵ֥ה אֵלַ֖י הָהָ֑רָה וְעָשִׂ֥יתָ לְּךָ֖ אֲר֥וֹן עֵֽץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: At that time the Lord said to me: Hew thee two tables of stone like the former, and come up to me into the mount: and thou shalt make an ark of wood,
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin sanoi Herra minulle: vuole sinulles kaksi kivistä taulua entisten kaltaista, ja astu minun tyköni vuorelle, ja tee sinulles puuarkki,
verses.king_james: At that time the Lord said unto me, Hew thee two tables of stone like unto the first, and come up unto me into the mount, and make thee an ark of wood.

verses.latin_vulgate: et scribam in tabulis verba quæ fuerunt in his qui ante confregisti : ponesque eas in arca.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶכְתֹּב֙ עַל־הַלֻּחֹ֔ת אֶ֨ת־הַדְּבָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר הָי֛וּ עַל־הַלֻּחֹ֥ת הָרִאשֹׁנִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר שִׁבַּ֑רְתָּ וְשַׂמְתָּ֖ם בָּאָרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I will write on the tables the words that were in them, which thou brokest before, and thou shalt put them in the ark.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä kirjoitan niihin tauluihin ne sanat, jotka ensimäisissä tauluissa olivat, jotka särkenyt olet: ja pane ne arkkiin.
verses.king_james: And I will write on the tables the words that were in the first tables which thou brakest, and thou shalt put them in the ark.

verses.latin_vulgate: Feci igitur arcam de lignis setim. Cumque dolassem duas tabulas lapideas instar priorum, ascendi in montem, habens eas in manibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאַ֤עַשׂ אֲרוֹן֙ עֲצֵ֣י שִׁטִּ֔ים וָאֶפְסֹ֛ל שְׁנֵי־לֻחֹ֥ת אֲבָנִ֖ים כָּרִאשֹׁנִ֑ים וָאַ֣עַל הָהָ֔רָה וּשְׁנֵ֥י הַלֻּחֹ֖ת בְּיָדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I made an ark of setim wood. And when I had hewn two tables of stone like the former, I went up into the mount, having them in my hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä tein arkin sittimipuusta, ja vuolin kaksi kivistä taulua entisten kaltaista, ja astuin vuorelle, pitäen kaksi taulua kädessäni.
verses.king_james: And I made an ark of shittim wood, and hewed two tables of stone like unto the first, and went up into the mount, having the two tables in mine hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scripsitque in tabulis, juxta id quod prius scripserat, verba decem, quæ locutus est Dominus ad vos in monte de medio ignis, quando populus congregatus est : et dedit eas mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּכְתֹּ֨ב עַֽל־הַלֻּחֹ֜ת כַּמִּכְתָּ֣ב הָרִאשׁ֗וֹן אֵ֚ת עֲשֶׂ֣רֶת הַדְּבָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר דִּבֶּר֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֲלֵיכֶ֥ם בָּהָ֛ר מִתּ֥וֹךְ הָאֵ֖שׁ בְּי֣וֹם הַקָּהָ֑ל וַיִּתְּנֵ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he wrote in the tables, according as he had written before, the ten words, which the Lord spoke to you in the mount from the midst of the fire, when the people were assembled: and he gave them to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin hän kirjoitti ensimäisen kirjoituksen jälkeen, niihin tauluihin ne kymmenet sanat, jotka Herra teille puhui vuorella tulesta, kokouksen päivänä: ja Herra antoi ne minulle.
verses.king_james: And he wrote on the tables, according to the first writing, the ten commandments, which the Lord spake unto you in the mount out of the midst of the fire in the day of the assembly: and the Lord gave them unto me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque de monte, descendi, et posui tabulas in arcam, quam feceram, quæ hucusque ibi sunt, sicut mihi præcepit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֵ֗פֶן וָֽאֵרֵד֙ מִן־הָהָ֔ר וָֽאָשִׂם֙ אֶת־הַלֻּחֹ֔ת בָּאָר֖וֹן אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשִׂ֑יתִי וַיִּ֣הְיוּ שָׁ֔ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר צִוַּ֖נִי יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And returning from the mount, I came down, and put the tables into the ark, that I had made, and they are there till this present, as the Lord commanded me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä käännyin ja astuin vuorelta alas, ja panin taulut arkkiin, jonka minä tein, että heidän piti siellä oleman, niinkuin Herra minulle käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: And I turned myself and came down from the mount, and put the tables in the ark which I had made; and there they be, as the Lord commanded me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Israël moverunt castra ex Beroth filiorum Jacan in Mosera, ubi Aaron mortuus ac sepultus est, pro quo sacerdotio functus est Eleazar filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל נָ֥סְע֛וּ מִבְּאֵרֹ֥ת בְּנֵי־יַעֲקָ֖ן מוֹסֵרָ֑ה שָׁ֣ם מֵ֤ת אַהֲרֹן֙ וַיִּקָּבֵ֣ר שָׁ֔ם וַיְכַהֵ֛ן אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel removed their camp from Beroth, of the children of Jacan into Mosera, where Aaron died and was buried, and Eleazar his son succeeded him in the priestly office.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset menivät BerotBeneJaakanista Moseraan: siellä kuoli Aaron ja haudattiin, ja hänen poikansa Eleatsar toimitti papin virkaa hänen siassansa.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel took their journey from Beeroth of the children of Jaakan to Mosera: there Aaron died, and there he was buried; and Eleazar his son ministered in the priest’s office in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inde venerunt in Gadgad : de quo loco profecti, castrametati sunt in Jetebatha, in terra aquarum atque torrentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִשָּׁ֥ם נָסְע֖וּ הַגֻּדְגֹּ֑דָה וּמִן־הַגֻּדְגֹּ֣דָה יׇטְבָ֔תָה אֶ֖רֶץ נַ֥חֲלֵי מָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: From thence they came to Gadgad, from which place they departed, and camped in Jetebatha, in a land of waters and torrents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sieltä menivät he Gudgodaan: Gudgodasta Jodbatiin, siihen maahan, jossa vesi-ojat ovat.
verses.king_james: From thence they journeyed unto Gudgodah; and from Gudgodah to Jotbath, a land of rivers of waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eo tempore separavit tribum Levi, ut portaret arcam fœderis Domini, et staret coram eo in ministerio, ac benediceret in nomine illius usque in præsentem diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֗וא הִבְדִּ֤יל יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־שֵׁ֣בֶט הַלֵּוִ֔י לָשֵׂ֖את אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֑ה לַעֲמֹד֩ לִפְנֵ֨י יְהֹוָ֤ה לְשָֽׁרְתוֹ֙ וּלְבָרֵ֣ךְ בִּשְׁמ֔וֹ עַ֖ד הַיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: At that time he separated the tribe of Levi, to carry the ark of the covenant of the Lord, and to stand before him in the ministry, and to bless in his name until this present day.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin eroitti Herra Levin suvun, kantamaan Herran liitonarkkia, seisomaan Herran edessä, palvelemaan häntä ja kiittämään hänen nimeänsä tähän päivään asti.
verses.king_james: At that time the Lord separated the tribe of Levi, to bear the ark of the covenant of the Lord, to stand before the Lord to minister unto him, and to bless in his name, unto this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam ob rem non habuit Levi partem, neque possessionem cum fratribus suis : quia ipse Dominus possessio ejus est, sicut promisit ei Dominus Deus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֞ן לֹֽא־הָיָ֧ה לְלֵוִ֛י חֵ֥לֶק וְנַחֲלָ֖ה עִם־אֶחָ֑יו יְהֹוָה֙ ה֣וּא נַחֲלָת֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבֶּ֛ר יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherefore Levi hath no part nor possession with his brethren: because the Lord himself is his possession, as the Lord thy God promised him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden ei ollut Leviläisillä yhtään osaa eli perimystä veljeinsä kanssa; sillä Herra on heidän perimyksensä, niinkuin Herra sinun Jumalas sanoi heille.
verses.king_james: Wherefore Levi hath no part nor inheritance with his brethren; the Lord is his inheritance, according as the Lord thy God promised him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem steti in monte, sicut prius, quadraginta diebus ac noctibus : exaudivitque me Dominus etiam hac vice, et te perdere noluit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֞י עָמַ֣דְתִּי בָהָ֗ר כַּיָּמִים֙ הָרִ֣אשֹׁנִ֔ים אַרְבָּעִ֣ים י֔וֹם וְאַרְבָּעִ֖ים לָ֑יְלָה וַיִּשְׁמַ֨ע יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י גַּ֚ם בַּפַּ֣עַם הַהִ֔וא לֹא־אָבָ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה הַשְׁחִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I stood in the mount, as before, forty days and nights: and the Lord heard me this time also, and would not destroy thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä seisoin vuorella niinkuin ennenkin, neljäkymmentä päivää ja neljäkymmentä yötä, ja vielä silloinkin kuuli Herra minun rukoukseni, eikä Herra tahtonut hukuttaa sinua.
verses.king_james: And I stayed in the mount, according to the first time, forty days and forty nights; and the Lord hearkened unto me at that time also, and the Lord would not destroy thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque mihi : Vade, et præcede populum, ut ingrediatur, et possideat terram, quam juravi patribus eorum ut traderem eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י ק֛וּם לֵ֥ךְ לְמַסַּ֖ע לִפְנֵ֣י הָעָ֑ם וְיָבֹ֙אוּ֙ וְיִֽירְשׁ֣וּ אֶת־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־נִשְׁבַּ֥עְתִּי לַאֲבֹתָ֖ם לָתֵ֥ת לָהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to me: Go, and walk before the people, that they may enter, and possess the land, which I swore to their fathers that I would give them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Herra sanoi minulle: nouse, ja mene matkaas, niin ettäs kansan edellä vaellat, että he tulisivat ja omistaisivat sen maan, jonka minä vannoin heidän isillensä antaakseni heille.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, Arise, take thy journey before the people, that they may go in and possess the land, which I sware unto their fathers to give unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc Israël, quid Dominus Deus tuus petit a te, nisi ut timeas Dominum Deum tuum, et ambules in viis ejus, et diligas eum, ac servias Domino Deo tuo in toto corde tuo, et in tota anima tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּה֙ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מָ֚ה יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ שֹׁאֵ֖ל מֵעִמָּ֑ךְ כִּ֣י אִם־לְ֠יִרְאָ֠ה אֶת־יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ לָלֶ֤כֶת בְּכׇל־דְּרָכָיו֙ וּלְאַהֲבָ֣ה אֹת֔וֹ וְלַֽעֲבֹד֙ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ בְּכׇל־לְבָבְךָ֖ וּבְכׇל־נַפְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now, Israel, what doth the Lord thy God require of thee, but that thou fear the Lord thy God, and walk in his ways, and love him, and serve the Lord thy God, with all thy heart, and with all thy soul:
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt siis Israel, mitä Herra sinun Jumalas sinulta muuta anoo; vaan ettäs pelkäisit Herraa sinun Jumalaas, ja vaeltaisit kaikissa hänen teissänsä ja rakastaisit häntä, ja palvelisit Herraa sinun Jumalaas kaikesta sinun sydämestäs ja kaikesta sinun sielustas:
verses.king_james: And now, Israel, what doth the Lord thy God require of thee, but to fear the Lord thy God, to walk in all his ways, and to love him, and to serve the Lord thy God with all thy heart and with all thy soul,

verses.latin_vulgate: custodiasque mandata Domini, et cæremonias ejus, quas ego hodie præcipio tibi, ut bene sit tibi ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁמֹ֞ר אֶת־מִצְוֺ֤ת יְהֹוָה֙ וְאֶת־חֻקֹּתָ֔יו אֲשֶׁ֛ר אָנֹכִ֥י מְצַוְּךָ֖ הַיּ֑וֹם לְט֖וֹב לָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And keep the commandments of the Lord, and his ceremonies, which I command thee this day, that it may be well with thee?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettäs myös pitäisit Herran käskyt ja hänen säätynsä, jotka minä käsken sinulle tänäpänä, että sinulle hyvin kävis.
verses.king_james: To keep the commandments of the Lord, and his statutes, which I command thee this day for thy good?

verses.latin_vulgate: En Domini Dei tui cælum est, et cælum cæli, terra, et omnia quæ in ea sunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֚ן לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וּשְׁמֵ֣י הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם הָאָ֖רֶץ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁר־בָּֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold heaven is the Lord's thy God, and the heaven of heaven, the earth and all things that are therein.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, taivaat ja taivasten taivaat ovat Herran sinun Jumalas, ja maa ja kaikki, mitä hänessä on.
verses.king_james: Behold, the heaven and the heaven of heavens is the Lord’s thy God, the earth also, with all that therein is.

verses.latin_vulgate: et tamen patribus tuis conglutinatus est Dominus, et amavit eos, elegitque semen eorum post eos, id est, vos, de cunctis gentibus, sicut hodie comprobatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֧ק בַּאֲבֹתֶ֛יךָ חָשַׁ֥ק יְהֹוָ֖ה לְאַהֲבָ֣ה אוֹתָ֑ם וַיִּבְחַ֞ר בְּזַרְעָ֣ם אַחֲרֵיהֶ֗ם בָּכֶ֛ם מִכׇּל־הָעַמִּ֖ים כַּיּ֥וֹם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And yet the Lord hath been closely joined to thy fathers, and loved them and chose their seed after them, that is to say, you, out of all nations, as this day it is proved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuitenkin Herralla on ollut hyvä suosio sinun isäis tykö rakastaaksensa heitä, ja on valinnut heidän siemenensä heidän jälkeensä, nimittäin teidät kaikista kansoista, niinkuin tänäpäivänäkin on.
verses.king_james: Only the Lord had a delight in thy fathers to love them, and he chose their seed after them, even you above all people, as it is this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumcidite igitur præputium cordis vestri, et cervicem vestram ne induretis amplius :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַלְתֶּ֕ם אֵ֖ת עׇרְלַ֣ת לְבַבְכֶ֑ם וְעׇ֨רְפְּכֶ֔ם לֹ֥א תַקְשׁ֖וּ עֽוֹד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and stiffen your neck no more.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ympärileikatkaat teidän sydämenne esinahka, ja älkäät enää niskurit olko!
verses.king_james: Circumcise therefore the foreskin of your heart, and be no more stiffnecked.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia Dominus Deus vester ipse est Deus deorum, et Dominus dominantium, Deus magnus, et potens, et terribilis, qui personam non accipit, nec munera.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֚י יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹֽהֵיכֶ֔ם ה֚וּא אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים וַאֲדֹנֵ֖י הָאֲדֹנִ֑ים הָאֵ֨ל הַגָּדֹ֤ל הַגִּבֹּר֙ וְהַנּוֹרָ֔א אֲשֶׁר֙ לֹא־יִשָּׂ֣א פָנִ֔ים וְלֹ֥א יִקַּ֖ח שֹֽׁחַד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because the Lord your God he is the God of gods, and the Lord of lords, a great God and mighty and terrible, who accepteth no person nor taketh bribes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra teidän Jumalanne on kaikkein jumalain Jumala, voimallinen ja peljättävä, joka ei katso muotoa, eikä lahjoja ota,
verses.king_james: For the Lord your God is God of gods, and Lord of lords, a great God, a mighty, and a terrible, which regardeth not persons, nor taketh reward:

verses.latin_vulgate: Facit judicium pupillo et viduæ ; amat peregrinum, et dat ei victum atque vestitum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹשֶׂ֛ה מִשְׁפַּ֥ט יָת֖וֹם וְאַלְמָנָ֑ה וְאֹהֵ֣ב גֵּ֔ר לָ֥תֶת ל֖וֹ לֶ֥חֶם וְשִׂמְלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He doth judgment to the fatherless and the widow, loveth the stranger, and giveth him food and raiment.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka orvoille ja leskille oikeuden tekee, ja rakastaa muukalaisia, niin että hän heille leivän ja vaatteen antaa.
verses.king_james: He doth execute the judgment of the fatherless and widow, and loveth the stranger, in giving him food and raiment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vos ergo amate peregrinos, quia et ipsi fuistis advenæ in terra Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲהַבְתֶּ֖ם אֶת־הַגֵּ֑ר כִּֽי־גֵרִ֥ים הֱיִיתֶ֖ם בְּאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And do you therefore love strangers, because you also were strangers in the land of Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää teidänkin rakastaman muukalaista; sillä te myös olitte muukalaiset Egyptin maalla.
verses.king_james: Love ye therefore the stranger: for ye were strangers in the land of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominum Deum tuum timebis, et ei soli servies : ipsi adhærebis, jurabisque in nomine illius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־יְהֹוָ֧ה אֱלֹהֶ֛יךָ תִּירָ֖א אֹת֣וֹ תַעֲבֹ֑ד וּב֣וֹ תִדְבָּ֔ק וּבִשְׁמ֖וֹ תִּשָּׁבֵֽעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou shalt fear the Lord thy God, and serve him only: to him thou shalt adhere, and shalt swear by his name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun pitää pelkäämän Herraa sinun Jumalaas, häntä pitää sinun palveleman, hänessä pitää sinun kiinni riippuman, ja hänen nimensä kautta vannoman.
verses.king_james: Thou shalt fear the Lord thy God; him shalt thou serve, and to him shalt thou cleave, and swear by his name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse est laus tua, et Deus tuus, qui fecit tibi hæc magnalia et terribilia, quæ viderunt oculi tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֥וּא תְהִלָּתְךָ֖ וְה֣וּא אֱלֹהֶ֑יךָ אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֣ה אִתְּךָ֗ אֶת־הַגְּדֹלֹ֤ת וְאֶת־הַנּֽוֹרָאֹת֙ הָאֵ֔לֶּה אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָא֖וּ עֵינֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He is thy praise, and thy God, that hath done for thee these great and terrible things, which thy eyes have seen.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on sinun ylistykses ja sinun Jumalas, joka sinulle teki suuria ja hirmuisia töitä, joita silmäs nähneet ovat.
verses.king_james: He is thy praise, and he is thy God, that hath done for thee these great and terrible things, which thine eyes have seen.

verses.latin_vulgate: In septuaginta animabus descenderunt patres tui in Ægyptum, et ecce nunc multiplicavit te Dominus Deus tuus sicut astra cæli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשִׁבְעִ֣ים נֶ֔פֶשׁ יָרְד֥וּ אֲבֹתֶ֖יךָ מִצְרָ֑יְמָה וְעַתָּ֗ה שָֽׂמְךָ֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ כְּכוֹכְבֵ֥י הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם לָרֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: In seventy souls thy fathers went down into Egypt: and behold now the Lord thy God hath multiplied thee as the stars of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun isäs menivät alas Egyptiin seitsemänkymmenen sielun kanssa; mutta nyt Herra sinun Jumalas on enentänyt sinun niinkuin taivaan tähdet.
verses.king_james: Thy fathers went down into Egypt with threescore and ten persons; and now the Lord thy God hath made thee as the stars of heaven for multitude.
